scripts.mainnet: sed -i 's/const network: lwk\.Network = lwk\.Network\..*()/const network: lwk.Network = lwk.Network.mainnet()/g' index.ts
scripts.testnet: sed -i 's/const network: lwk\.Network = lwk\.Network\..*()/const network: lwk.Network = lwk.Network.testnet()/g' index.ts
scripts.regtest: sed -i 's/const network: lwk\.Network = lwk\.Network\..*()/const network: lwk.Network = lwk.Network.regtestDefault()/g' index.ts
scripts.add-git-hash:
echo "
<!-- Git commit: $(git rev-parse HEAD) -->" >> index.html
scripts.remove-git-hash: grep -v 'Git commit:' index.html > index.html.tmp && mv index.html.tmp index.html
scripts.deploy-mainnet: npm run check-release-build && npm run mainnet && npm run build && npm run sync-mainnet
scripts.deploy-testnet: npm run check-release-build && npm run testnet && npm run build && npm run sync-testnet
scripts.deploy-regtest: npm run check-release-build && npm run regtest && npm run build && npm run sync-regtest
scripts.deploy: npm run add-git-hash && npm run check-release-build && npm run deploy-mainnet && npm run deploy-testnet && npm run remove-git-hash
scripts.sync-mainnet: rsync -avh dist/ root@praga:/var/www/liquidwebwallet.org/ && rsync -avh dist/ root@gandi2:/var/www/liquidwebwallet.org/
scripts.test: npm run regtest && playwright test --project regtest
scripts.test-notification: npm run regtest && playwright test --project regtest --grep notification --headed
scripts.test-liquidex: npm run regtest && playwright test --project regtest --grep liquidex --headed
scripts.test-multi: npm run regtest && playwright test --project regtest --grep multisignature --headed
scripts.test-issuance-reissuance-burn: npm run regtest && playwright test --project regtest --grep reissuance --headed
scripts.test-testnet: npm run testnet && playwright test --project testnet
scripts.test-boltz: npm run regtest && playwright test --project boltz-regtest
